title: Post-Doctoral Fellow
description: Advanced research at one of the world's leading universities (QS Rank 15, THE Rank 10, Asia Rank 1).

Focused on the fabrication and characterization of novel magnesium alloys and composites, including mechanical analysis, microstructural evaluation, and degradation behavior for structural and biomedical applications.
Guided and mentored master's and Ph.D. students of the supervising group.

research.title: Novel Magnesium Alloys and Composites
research.description: Development of high-performance magnesium-based materials, with in-depth analysis of microstructure-property relationships and corrosion/degradation mechanisms.
